{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Shann
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Del'rek]] is from the [[Shann]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Del’rek is from the [[Shann]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
